requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for Eritrea PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——厄立特里亚光伏逆变器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——厄利垂亞光伏逆變器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: A public Eritrea solar-inverter-specific EMC regulation or strong national standards-body route could not be confirmed. For grid-tied, mini-grid, donor-financed, or EEC-reviewed PV projects, IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emissions evidence are the practical technical baseline. EMC and power-quality review should reflect weak feeders, isolated hybrid networks, generator-backed loads, long cable runs, and high dust conditions rather than assuming a stable urban grid.
summary.zh: 未能确认厄立特里亚公开的太阳能逆变器专用EMC法规或强国家标准机构路径。对于并网、微电网、捐助方融资或EEC审查的光伏项目，光伏功率变换设备IEC 62920以及IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变、抗扰度和发射证据是实际技术基准。EMC和电能质量审查应反映薄弱馈线、独立混合电网、发电机后备负荷、长电缆线路和高沙尘条件，而不能假定为稳定城市电网。
summary.zht: 未能確認厄利垂亞公開的太陽能逆變器專用EMC法規或強國家標準機構路徑。對於併網、微電網、捐助方融資或EEC審查的光伏項目，光伏功率轉換設備IEC 62920以及IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變、抗擾度和發射證據是實際技術基準。EMC和電能品質審查應反映薄弱饋線、獨立混合電網、發電機後備負荷、長電纜線路和高沙塵條件，而不能假定為穩定城市電網。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Harmonic current emissions limits where applicable by current rating
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 — Voltage changes, fluctuations, and flicker where applicable
IEC 61000-6 series — Generic EMC immunity and emission standards where project specifications invoke them
EEC / project-owner power-quality and commissioning requirements where applicable

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly included in GB/T 37408-2021 and related China certification files, with testing often performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories. The methods may reference IEC 61000 concepts, but report scope, limits, test voltage, installation configuration, and certificate language may not match IEC 62920 or the specific IEC 61000 clauses required by an Eritrea project. China EMC evidence should be mapped clause-by-clause and should not be presented as automatic Eritrea acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常包含在GB/T 37408-2021及相关中国认证文件中，测试通常由CNAS认可实验室完成。测试方法可能参考IEC 61000概念，但报告范围、限值、测试电压、安装配置和证书语言未必匹配厄立特里亚项目要求的IEC 62920或具体IEC 61000条款。中国EMC证据应逐条映射，不应作为厄立特里亚自动接受依据提交。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常包含在GB/T 37408-2021及相關中國認證文件中，測試通常由CNAS認可實驗室完成。測試方法可能參考IEC 61000概念，但報告範圍、限值、測試電壓、安裝配置和證書語言未必匹配厄利垂亞項目要求的IEC 62920或具體IEC 61000條款。中國EMC證據應逐條映射，不應作為厄利垂亞自動接受依據提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC certificates alone may not satisfy EEC, project-owner, or lender acceptance in Eritrea. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62920 EMC type-test evidence, applicable IEC 61000 harmonic and flicker reports, conducted and radiated emissions and immunity reports, and power-quality studies for the exact inverter rating and grid, mini-grid, or hybrid configuration. Where prior testing was performed under China's 220/380 V conditions, confirm whether 230/400 V operation changes harmonic or protection results.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有GB/T 37408 EMC证书可能无法满足厄立特里亚EEC、项目业主或贷款方验收。出口商应取得或映射IEC 62920 EMC型式试验证据、适用IEC 61000谐波和闪变报告、传导和辐射发射及抗扰度报告，以及针对具体逆变器功率等级和并网、微电网或混合配置的电能质量研究。若既有测试在中国220/380 V条件下完成，应确认230/400 V运行是否改变谐波或保护结果。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有GB/T 37408 EMC證書可能無法滿足厄利垂亞EEC、項目業主或貸款方驗收。出口商應取得或映射IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗證據、適用IEC 61000諧波和閃變報告、傳導和輻射發射及抗擾度報告，以及針對具體逆變器功率等級和併網、微電網或混合配置的電能品質研究。若既有測試在中國220/380 V條件下完成，應確認230/400 V運行是否改變諧波或保護結果。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice where EEC, project owners, ministries, or donor/lender specifications require IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T EMC evidence is a China-side technical baseline; it is not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence in Eritrea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Map China EMC files to IEC 62920 and the exact IEC 61000 clauses named by the Eritrea project. For weak-grid, mini-grid, or donor-financed systems, include power-quality analysis and 230/400 V local operating assumptions rather than relying only on a China GB/T EMC certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国EMC文件映射至IEC 62920以及厄立特里亚项目列明的具体IEC 61000条款。对于弱电网、微电网或捐助方融资系统，应纳入电能质量分析和230/400 V当地运行假设，而不是仅依赖中国GB/T EMC证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國EMC文件映射至IEC 62920以及厄利垂亞項目列明的具體IEC 61000條款。對於弱電網、微電網或捐助方融資系統，應納入電能品質分析和230/400 V當地運行假設，而不是僅依賴中國GB/T EMC證書。
